description: OpenMeter is a usage metering and billing platform for AI, SaaS, and developer-focused companies. It is offered both as open source software and as a managed cloud service.
summary: OpenMeter exposes three public REST API surfaces: the authenticated OpenMeter Cloud API, a self-hosted/open-source REST API, and an in-progress API v3; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
